titleStmt.title: SII 5.989: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 989. (A.R. No. 124 of 1896). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tri ripuvaṉaccakkarava
ttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭi
yaṉmuṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭa
ruḷiṉa [śrī]kulottuṅkacoḻateva
rkku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu Irā- jādhi rāja
vaḷanāṭṭut tirukkaḻumalināṭṭup pira
matecam tirukkaḻumalattut tirutto
ṇipuramuṭaiyanāyanāṟku jeyaṅ
koṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalai
ppaḻayaṉūrnāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉū
ruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ U
ṭaiyanāyakaṉukkup pukka naṭuvi
lnāṭāṉa Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu
Ānāṅkūrk kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ jeṉa
nātakaṟpakam Araiyaṉ makaḷ Eti
rilāp perumāḷum Ivaḷmaka
ḷ cuttamalivaḷanāṭṭu veṇ
ṇikkūṟṟattup perumuruṭai yā
ṉ nāyaṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉu
kkup pukka Umaiyāḻviyum Ivvi
ruvom Eṅkaḷ parttākkaḷukkum E
ṅkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷ vaṅcattukku
m naṉṟāka Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu
māttūr nāṭṭu Oḻukaṟaiyāṉa
kulottuṅka coḻanallūrkkaṉai
yūr nantimaṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ cūriya
tevaṉ tiruñāṉacampantaṉar muṉ
ṉilaiyāka Ivarpakkal kācu kuṭuttu
Ivar palarperilum kācu kuṭuttuk koṇṭu
Ivarperile piramāṇam paṇṇi
nāṅkaḷ koṇṭu viṭṭa Ūr
kkaṇak(k)kuc ceṟṟūruṭai
yāṉuñ capaiyāru meḻuttiṭṭa
capāniyokappaṭi cantirātitta
varai kācu
koḷḷāviṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa ni
lamāvatu tirukkaḻumalattuc cut
tamalivatikku meṟkut tillaiviṭa
ṅkavāykkālukkut teṟku kakaṇ
ṇāṟṟu U-ñcatirattu vācciyaṉ tiru
ttoṇipuramuṭaiyāṉpakkal
koṇṭa kollai kuḻi 300- m kā
cipan ciruṭaikkaḻal Āḻvā
n pakkal koṇṭa kollaiy ku
ḻi 3 100- m kācivan Uyyaninṟāṭi pa
kkal koṇṭa kollai kuḻi muṉnū
ṟum cuttamalivatikku meṟku ti
llaiviṭaṅkavākkālukku teṟ
ku U-ṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu munṟā
ñ catirattu tuṇṭattu cāvānti vira
pattiran Uyyakkoṇṭapiḷḷaipak
kal kiḻakkiṭṭu teṟkaṭaiya Ampa
tu kuḻi nikkik koṇṭa kollaiy kuḻi
100- m mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ cati
rattu viracci
yaṉ centana tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ
Uḷḷiṭṭārpakkaṟ koṇṭa kollai
kuḻi 100- m Ākak kollai kuḻi 1000 nilam I Iṉ
nilam Araiyil Ivarkaḷukku jivanattuk
ku viṭṭa nilam tirunaṉtavaṉam ceytananilam kālum kaik
koṇṭu tāṅkaḷ veṇṭina payiṟ cey
tukoṇṭu nikkiniṉṟa nilam nāyanāṟ
kkut tirunaṉtavanam ceytu naṟutiruppaḷḷi
ttāmam Ākavum paṭak kuṭikkuṟṟam paṭāmaṟ
cai ytu Aḷakkakaṭavārākavum Innilam
Araiyum cantirātittavarai kācukoḷḷā yiṟai
yiliyākak koṇṭu viṭṭom Etirilāpperu
māḷum Ivaṉ makaḷ Umai yāḻviyum yivviru
vom Ituśrīmāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 5.989 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
